act.backend: Wiring up the logic behind your site…
act.taking_longer: Taking a little longer than expected…
account.delete.confirm: I understand that my unpaid projects and their stored files will be permanently deleted.
account.delete.intro: This permanently deletes your account and unpaid projects. If an account has a subscription or managed domain, contact us so billing and the domain can be closed or transferred safely.
domain.buy_note: The first-year price is added to your next invoice; after that the domain renews yearly at the regular price shown. DNS and HTTPS are set up automatically.
domain.byod_note: You’ll set two DNS records at your registrar; we verify them and secure the site with HTTPS automatically.
domain.detach_confirm: Remove this domain from your site?
domain.failed_note: We couldn’t finish setting up this domain. Rasmus has been notified and will sort it out.
domain.intro: Connect a custom domain to your site — use one you already own, or buy a new one here.
domain.none: No available domains for that search. Try another name.
domain.pending_note: Add these DNS records for %s at your domain provider, then verify:
domain.rec_note: Set these as DNS-only (grey cloud) records. Changes can take a little while to take effect.
domain.registering_note: We’re registering %s — nothing you need to do.
domain.search_error: Domain search is unavailable right now. Please try again.
domain.verifying_note: DNS found — issuing your certificate. This can take a few minutes.
flash.brief_long: That description is too long — please keep it under 4000 characters.
flash.brief_short: Tell me a bit more about the site you want (at least a sentence).
flash.capacity: We’re at full build capacity right now — please try again in a few minutes.
flash.daily_limit: Daily limit reached (%d projects per day) — come back tomorrow.
flash.domain_attached: Domain added — set the DNS records shown to finish.
flash.domain_buying: We’re registering your domain — this can take a few minutes.
flash.domain_error: Something went wrong with the domain. Please try again.
flash.domain_exists: This project already has a domain.
flash.domain_invalid: That doesn’t look like a valid domain name.
flash.domain_toopricey: That domain is priced above our self-serve limit. Try another.
flash.domain_unavailable: That domain isn’t available to register.
flash.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
flash.magic_invalid: That login link is invalid or has expired — request a new one.
flash.magic_sent: Check your email — we sent you a login link.
flash.oauth_failed: Could not sign you in with %s.
flash.one_at_a_time: One project at a time — wait for your current build to finish.
flash.signup_invalid: Enter a valid email and a password of at least 8 characters.
flash.sub_cancel: Checkout cancelled — no charge was made.
flash.sub_error: Something went wrong starting the subscription. Please try again.
flash.sub_success: Thank you! Your payment is processing — your subscription activates within a minute.
flash.consent_required: Confirm the terms and your request for delivery during the withdrawal period before continuing.
flash.account_managed: This account or project has billing or a managed domain. Contact rasmus@transcendsoftware.se so it can be closed, transferred and erased safely.
flash.delete_busy: Wait for the current project operation to finish, then delete it.
flash.try_later: Too many attempts. Wait a while, then try again.
flash.verified: Email confirmed — submit your first project for review below.
flash.verify_invalid: That confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Sign in and we’ll send a fresh one.
flash.verify_required: Please confirm your email address first — check your inbox for the link.
flash.verify_sent: We’ve sent a confirmation link to your email. Click it to submit your project.
flash.approval_pending: Your first project is already waiting for approval — open it from your dashboard.
gen.prompt.style: Clean and professional, ready to place directly on the site, no watermark or text unless it is a logo wordmark.
landing.about.p1: Your site is built by my AI agent and
landing.about.p2: before it ships. I’m Rasmus Kockum — a senior engineer and tech lead who’s been building and leading production software teams since 2016.
landing.domain.existing: Already own a domain? You can connect it using two DNS records we show you.
landing.domain.h2: Choose your domain here. We configure it for you.
landing.domain.note: The first-year price is paid at checkout. The yearly renewal price is shown before you choose.
landing.domain.point1: Search and buy directly in Forge
landing.domain.text: Search for and buy your domain when you’re ready to launch. Forge registers it, configures DNS and HTTPS automatically, and handles the yearly renewal. No registrar account. No DNS settings.
landing.examples.h2: Real websites, built from a brief
landing.examples.lead: See how Forge turns a business description into a polished website that works on desktop and mobile.
landing.how1.text: Tell us what you do, who the site is for, and what it should achieve.
landing.how2.text: Forge builds and publishes it for free, so you can click through the real site.
landing.how3.text: Two rounds of preview changes are included before you decide.
landing.how4.text: I personally review the site; hosting, HTTPS, and backups are handled.
landing.lead1: Tell us what your business does and what the website should achieve. Forge builds a working preview you can try for free.
landing.lead2: — then I personally review it and get it live.
landing.lead_strong: You only pay when you want to launch
landing.price.free: Describing your site and getting a live preview is free. You only pay when you’re happy and want it live.
landing.price.covers: Everything to get your site live and keep it running:
landing.price.incl.hosting: Hosting, HTTPS and continuous backups included
landing.price.incl.review: Personally reviewed by me before it goes live
landing.price.incl.changes_one: 1 change a month included — request tweaks anytime
landing.price.incl.changes_many: %d changes a month included — request tweaks anytime
landing.price.overage: Need more in a month? Each extra change is %s, added to your next invoice.
landing.price.domain.h3: Your own domain, set up for you
landing.price.domain.text: Search for and buy your domain during checkout. Forge automatically handles registration, DNS, HTTPS, and yearly renewal.
landing.price.domain.note: Your first-year and yearly renewal prices are shown before payment. Already own a domain? Connect it using two DNS records we provide.
landing.proof1.label: served by systems I’ve built
landing.proof2.label: senior engineer & tech lead
landing.proof3.label: have trusted me with mission-critical systems
landing.sub: No card required. I personally approve your first project before work starts. Hosting, HTTPS, and continuous backups are included.
landing.sub_domain: No card required. I personally approve your first project before work starts. Hosting, HTTPS, and backups are included. You can also buy your domain here and have it configured automatically.
meta.desc: Transcend Forge builds and hosts your business website. Review a free working preview before you pay, and buy a domain that is configured automatically.
new.brief_ph: A website for my bakery. Show our sourdough and pastries, opening hours, and how to place an order for pickup.
new.intro: Describe the website you want. The more concrete you are about the business, the pages, and whether you need online ordering, the better.
new.approval_note: Your first project is reviewed by Rasmus before any work starts. Once approved, you can start future projects immediately.
preview.error_body: The site did not respond. Please try again in a moment.
preview.gone_body: This preview was taken down after a period of inactivity. The site owner can start a new build from their Forge dashboard.
preview.notfound_body: There is no site at this address.
prj.accept.intro: Take a look and try it out — request changes if anything’s off. When you accept, Rasmus does a final check that it works before it’s delivered.
prj.apply.intro: You’ve added new content since your site was last built.
prj.apply.note: This uses one of your changes and rebuilds the site with everything you’ve provided.
prj.approve.ack: Build with placeholders for now — I’ll add these later.
prj.assets.desc_ph: What is this? e.g. our logo, photo of the shop front, the menu
prj.assets.intro: Upload your real photos, logo, or content (PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP, PDF — up to 10 MB). The agent uses these when building your site.
prj.change.live_note: Your change goes live as soon as you accept the new preview — no waiting for review.
prj.change.overage: You’ve used this month’s included changes. Each extra change costs %s and is added to your next invoice.
prj.change.overage_note: Need more in a month? Each extra change is %s, added to your next invoice.
prj.change.ph: Make the hero photo bigger and add an opening-hours section.
prj.files.label_hint: Label each photo with what it shows (e.g. the recipe or product name) so it lands in the right place on your site.
prj.gen.again: Not quite? Adjust the description and try again
prj.gen.failed: Image generation didn’t work this time. Please try again.
prj.gen.improve_label: Describe how to change your image
prj.gen.limit_note: You’ve reached the AI-image limit for this project. You can still upload your own images.
prj.gen.pick_intro: Pick the one you like — you can refine it after:
prj.gen.prompt_ph: Describe the image, or leave blank
prj.q.answers_ph: Answer the questions above in your own words.
prj.q.design_intro: Pick a direction — or describe your own.
prj.q.intro: Answering these helps the agent build the right thing the first time.
prj.q.own_ph: e.g. dark and dramatic, gold accents, elegant serif headings
prj.retry.intro: Nothing was lost. Run it again — a retry doesn’t use up one of your changes.
prj.roster.name: Name
prj.scope.approve_intro: Happy with this? Approve it and we’ll start building. Nothing is built until you say go.
signup.approval_note: No card required. Rasmus personally reviews your first project before work starts; once approved, future projects start immediately.
signup.legal_pre: How we use your email is explained in our
signup.magic_hint: We’ll email you a link — no password to remember.
st.accepted_note: Rasmus is giving it a final review — you’ll hear as soon as it’s delivered.
st.accepted_unpaid: Rasmus is giving it a final review. Start your subscription below and he’ll deliver it as soon as it’s reviewed.
st.delivered_note: Reviewed by Rasmus — up and running. 🎉
st.escalated_note: Held for a quick human review by Rasmus — this page updates on its own.
st.pending_access_note: Your project is saved. Rasmus will review it before any work starts, and this page will update automatically.
sub.accepts_note: Subscribing also accepts this version of your site — Rasmus takes it from there.
sub.consumer_consent: I agree to the terms and ask Transcend Forge to begin delivery during the 14-day withdrawal period. I understand that my right of withdrawal may end once the service has been fully performed.
sub.domain.byod: Use a domain I already own
sub.domain.none: Decide later — I’ll add a domain after paying
sub.domain.buy_note: The one-year price shown is included in this payment. DNS and HTTPS are set up automatically.
sub.incl.changes_many: %d changes a month included — request fixes and tweaks anytime.
sub.incl.changes_one: 1 change a month included — request fixes and tweaks anytime.
sub.incl.support: Email support if anything unexpected comes up.
sub.incl.uptime: Rasmus guarantees your site stays up and running.
sub.intro: The preview is free. A subscription covers delivery, hosting and your future domain — Rasmus then personally checks your site works before it goes live.
sub.processing: Payment received — your subscription is activating. This page will update shortly.
sub.terms_pre: By subscribing you agree to the
privacy.automation.p: AI services help plan, build and review websites and screen requests for safety. A request may be paused or rejected by that screening. Contact us if you want a human review of a decision.
privacy.collect.p: We process your email, login and session data, project descriptions and answers, uploaded files and generated website material, build and security logs, subscription and domain identifiers, and messages you send us. Stripe handles card details; Forge does not store them.
privacy.controller.p: Rasmus Kockum, trading as Transcend Software in Sweden, is responsible for the processing described here. Contact:
privacy.cookies.p: Forge uses only essential cookies for login security, CSRF protection and your language choice. We also keep anonymous daily counts of public funnel steps and UTM campaign labels; these contain no IP address, device identifier or account link. We do not use advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.
privacy.providers.p: We use providers for EU hosting and object storage, payments (Stripe), transactional email (Resend), AI processing, deployment (Fly.io), and domain registration when requested. Some providers may process data outside the EU/EEA under an adequacy decision or contractual safeguards.
privacy.purpose.p: We process data to provide previews and subscriptions, secure accounts, communicate about delivery, handle payments and domains, prevent abuse, meet legal and accounting duties, and improve reliability. The legal bases are performance of a contract or pre-contractual request, legitimate interests in security and service operation, legal obligations, and consent where specifically requested.
privacy.retention.p: We keep account and project data while needed to provide the service. Deleting a project removes its stored uploads, snapshots and screenshots. Some payment, contract, withdrawal and accounting records are retained for the periods required by law or needed to establish legal claims. Backups expire according to their retention cycle.
privacy.rights.p: You may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, objection or data portability where applicable, and withdraw consent without affecting earlier processing. Contact us to exercise a right. You may also complain to the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (IMY).
privacy.title: Privacy notice
project.delete.confirm: I understand that this project and all its uploaded and generated files will be permanently deleted.
project.delete.intro: This removes the preview, build history, uploads, screenshots and snapshots. It cannot be undone.
terms.cancel.p: You may cancel at any time through Manage subscription. Cancellation stops the next renewal; service continues through the period already paid for unless mandatory law requires otherwise. Hosting and a managed domain may stop after the subscription or paid domain period ends.
terms.changes.p: The project page shows the number of changes included each month and the disclosed price of an additional change. An accepted change to an already delivered site may go live without a new personal review.
terms.data.p: Our privacy notice explains what data we process, why, for how long and your rights:
terms.delivery.p: Rasmus personally checks the initial website before first delivery. You are responsible for reviewing content and confirming that it is accurate and lawful. Later changes are checked by you in a preview and may go live when you accept them.
terms.preview.p: The preview is free and does not require a subscription. Inactive unpaid previews and their infrastructure may be removed after the retention period shown in the service.
terms.price.p: The total recurring price, billing interval, any one-time domain price and included changes are displayed before Checkout. Stripe processes payment. The subscription renews automatically until cancelled.
terms.responsibility.p: We provide the service with reasonable professional care. Nothing in these terms limits rights or remedies that cannot legally be limited for a consumer. Tell us promptly about faults so we can investigate and correct them.
terms.service.p: Transcend Forge creates a website from your description and provides a free live preview. A paid subscription covers first delivery, hosting and the benefits listed at Checkout. The service is provided by Transcend Software (Rasmus Kockum), Sweden.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.withdraw.p: Consumers normally have 14 days to withdraw from a distance contract. At Checkout you can expressly ask us to begin delivery during that period. If the service is fully performed after your express request and acknowledgement, the right may end as permitted by law. If you withdraw after performance has begun, you may have to pay a proportionate amount for what was supplied. You can submit a withdrawal at any time during the applicable period:
withdraw.confirm: I clearly state that I want to withdraw from my Transcend Forge purchase or subscription.
withdraw.email.body:
We received your withdrawal request.

Reference: %s
Received: %s
Project/reference supplied: %s

We will match it to your purchase and contact you if anything else is needed. Keep this email as confirmation of your request.

Transcend Forge · rasmus@transcendsoftware.se
withdraw.email.subject: Your Transcend Forge withdrawal request
withdraw.email_failed: Your request was recorded, but the confirmation email could not be sent. Save the reference and contact rasmus@transcendsoftware.se.
withdraw.intro: Use this function to exercise a consumer right of withdrawal. We record the time immediately and email you a durable confirmation. Cancelling future renewals is separate and remains available under Manage subscription.
withdraw.invalid: Enter the purchase email and confirm that you want to withdraw.
withdraw.project: Project ID or other purchase reference (optional)
withdraw.project_hint: You can find the project ID in its Forge page URL. Leave this blank if you do not have it.
withdraw.received: Your withdrawal request has been received and recorded. A confirmation has been sent to your email.
withdraw.title: Withdraw from a purchase
verify.banner: Please confirm your email address to start building — check your inbox for the link.
verify.email.body:
Welcome to Transcend Forge! Confirm your email address to start building your site:

%s

If you didn’t create this account, you can ignore this email.
verify.email.subject: Confirm your email — Transcend Forge
